title: After TMC Now NCP-Congress Merger Buzz Intensifies, Supriya Sule Says 'Only Time Will Tell'
description: Speculation on opposition realignment surged after Shiv Sena (UBT) leader Sanjay Raut suggested that parties that split from Congress should reunite to strengthen the anti-BJP front. He highlighted the need for ideological allies, like the NCP and TMC, to collaborate.
